title: RtfShader
description: A clean Minecraft shaderpack with smooth lighting, atmospheric visuals, and balanced effects for everyday gameplay.
body:
RtfShaders

RtfShaders is a Minecraft shaderpack focused on clean visuals, atmospheric lighting, and a smooth gameplay experience.

The shader aims to improve Minecraft’s appearance while keeping the style simple and enjoyable for survival gameplay.

Features
Smooth lighting
Enhanced water reflections
Atmospheric nights
Dynamic shadows
Balanced colors
Clean visual style
Recommended Mods
Iris Shaders
Sodium
Supported Version
Minecraft 1.21+
Installation
Install Iris Shaders
Open the shaderpacks folder
Put the RtfShaders zip file inside
Enable the shader in Minecraft settings

Experience Minecraft with smoother lighting and a cleaner atmosphere using RtfShaders.
